metadata.name: Fabricate 2 — Weaponcraft Enthusiast chooses counters
metadata.description: p1 casts Weaponcraft Enthusiast ({2}{B}, 0/1 Aetherborn Artificer, Fabricate 2). When it enters the battlefield, Fabricate 2 fires inline (same pattern as Tribute — ETB trigger executed immediately, not as a separate stack object per CR 702.123a): the bot always chooses counters, so Weaponcraft Enthusiast receives 2 +1/+1 counters and becomes effectively 2/3. Final state: Enthusiast on battlefield with 2 +1/+1 counters, stack empty, life totals unchanged.
metadata.generation_notes: Fabricate fires inline in fire_when_enters_triggered_effects() — not as a separate stack object. Bot always chooses counters (never tokens). Weaponcraft Enthusiast: {2}{B}, 0/1. Fabricate 2 grants exactly 2 +1/+1 counters when counters are chosen (CR 702.123a). Post-resolution: effective P/T is 2/3 (0+2 / 1+2). p1 needs {2}{B} = 2 colorless + 1 black. SBA check: toughness 3, no damage — no actions taken.

script.step_note: p1 casts Weaponcraft Enthusiast. It resolves and enters the battlefield. Fabricate 2 fires inline at ETB: bot chooses counters, so Enthusiast gets 2 +1/+1 counters (becomes 2/3 effective).

actions.description: Initial: Weaponcraft Enthusiast in p1 hand; battlefield empty; p1 has {2}{B} in pool; stack empty
actions.note: p1 has {2}{B} in pool — exactly enough to cast Weaponcraft Enthusiast. Battlefield is empty.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Weaponcraft Enthusiast ({2}{B}). Card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After cast: Weaponcraft Enthusiast on stack (count 1); p1 hand empty
actions.note: Weaponcraft Enthusiast is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Weaponcraft Enthusiast resolves (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Weaponcraft Enthusiast enters the battlefield. CR 702.123a: Fabricate 2 — bot chooses counters (not tokens). 2 +1/+1 counters are placed on Weaponcraft Enthusiast immediately (inline ETB processing, no separate stack trigger step).

actions.note: Weaponcraft Enthusiast resolves. ETB processing fires Fabricate 2 trigger inline: bot selects counters, 2 +1/+1 counters are added. Enthusiast is now effectively 2/3.
CR 704.3: SBAs checked. Weaponcraft Enthusiast toughness = 3 (1 base + 2 from counters), no damage marked — no SBAs triggered.

actions.description: Final: Weaponcraft Enthusiast on p1 battlefield with 2 +1/+1 counters (2/3 effective); stack empty; life totals unchanged
actions.note: CR 702.123a: Fabricate 2 + counter choice = 2 +1/+1 counters on Weaponcraft Enthusiast (0+2 / 1+2 = 2/3 effective). No tokens created. Stack empty.
